claims.label: Definition (Fixed-axis right-sided DQFT)
claims.statement: For x[n] in H, define X[k]=sum_{n=0}^{N-1} x[n] exp(-i 2πnk/N) with right-sided kernel placement and fixed axis i.
claims.notes: Core forward transform convention for the paper.

claims.label: Definition (Inverse transform)
claims.statement: The inverse convention is x[n]=(1/N)sum_{k=0}^{N-1} X[k] exp(+i 2πnk/N), matching the fixed-axis right-sided kernel placement.
claims.notes: Normalization and sign convention align with the public transform seam.

claims.label: Proposition (Right C_i-linearity)
claims.proof_sketch: Commutation of C_i scalars with the fixed-axis kernel allows right factors to be pulled through sums.
claims.notes: Linearity is restricted to the commuting slice, not all of H.

claims.label: Theorem (Exact inversion)
claims.statement: For every quaternion lane x, F_i^{-1}(F_i{x})[m]=x[m] for all m=0,...,N-1.
claims.proof_sketch: Substitute forward into inverse and apply discrete kernel orthogonality within C_i.
claims.notes: Establishes bijectivity of the fixed-axis right-sided transform on H^N.

claims.label: Proposition (Spectral power nonnegativity)
claims.statement: For each k, P[k]=|X[k]|^2=X[k]X[k]^* lies in R_{>=0}.
claims.proof_sketch: Quaternion norm identity qq^*=|q|^2 is always real and nonnegative.
claims.notes: Defines a real-valued binwise power invariant.

claims.label: Theorem (Parseval identity)
claims.proof_sketch: Expand X[k]X[k]^*, sum over k, and collapse cross terms using kernel orthogonality.
claims.notes: Energy invariance under the declared normalization.

claims.label: Proposition (Lanewise multichannel Parseval)
claims.statement: For lifted lanes Q[g,n], sum_{g,n}|Q[g,n]|^2=(1/N)sum_{g,k}|X_g[k]|^2 where X_g is the lane-wise spectrum.
claims.proof_sketch: Apply single-lane Parseval identity independently to each lane and sum over g.
claims.notes: Extends energy invariance to grouped multichannel captures.
